news.t: Westwood Announces Monthly Income Distributions for Westwood Salient Enhanced Midstream Income ETF (MDST),Westwood Salient Enhanced Energy Income ETF (WEEI) and Westwood Enhanced Income Opportunity (YLDW)
Westwood Enhanced Income Series™ ETF Platform Surpasses $250 Million in Assets
Westwood Announces Monthly Income Distributions for Westwood Salient Enhanced Midstream Income ETF (MDST) and Westwood Salient Enhanced Energy Income ETF (WEEI)
Two stock-sector funds for investors who want high dividend income
Westwood Announces Launch of Westwood Salient Enhanced Energy Income ETF (WEEI)

holdings.infoBox: WEEI is an equity ETF with a total of 146 individual holdings. The top holdings are Exxon Mobil stock at 22.99%, Chevron at 14.11%, ConocoPhillips at 5.99%, SLB N.V. at 5.23%, and Valero Energy at 5.09%.

overview.description: The Westwood Salient Enhanced Energy Income ETF (WEEI) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in energy equity. The fund is an actively managed portfolio seeking to provide monthly income by investing in North American energy companies and writing 1-month call options, on a recurring basis. Stocks are selected and weighted based on fundamental criteria. WEEI was launched on May 1, 2024 and is issued by Westwood.
